personal.name: Shashan Lumbhani
personal.title: AI Engineer & Software Developer
personal.tagline: Machine Learning | Deep Learning | Full-Stack Development
personal.bio: Turning complex problems into elegant solutions through the power of AI and clean code.
personal.availability: Open to India +4 more, remote & hybrid

hero.description: AI Engineer specializing in Deep Learning, Neural Architecture Search, and Full-Stack Development. Currently pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering at CHARUSAT, building intelligent systems that bridge research and real-world impact.

projects.title: H-NAS: Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search
projects.description: Hardware-aware evolutionary search for efficient Inverted Residual Network design. Explored 3.8B MBConv-based architectures optimizing balanced accuracy, latency (<20ms), and FLOPS (<600M) using sandwich sampling, weight-sharing supernet, and focal loss for imbalanced datasets.

projects.title: Codify: Smart Learning & Assessment Platform
projects.description: Next-generation online examination ecosystem for institutions. Supports MCQs, coding challenges with live compiler, and subjective answers. Role-based management (admin/teacher/student) with automatic evaluation, result generation, and full exam lifecycle management.

projects.title: TNP Portal — CSE Department
projects.description: Training & Placement portal for CSPIT CSE Department. Students build professional profiles, access placement resources, and engage in peer-based competitive features. Faculty coordinators track progress and guide students through their placement journey.

projects.title: Fruit Quality Prediction
projects.description: Deep Learning application using Convolutional Neural Networks to classify quality of six fruits — Apple, Banana, Guava, Lime, Orange, and Pomegranate — into Good, Bad, or Mixed. CNN architecture extracts visual features for reliable real-time quality assessment.

projects.title: HAM10000 Skin Lesion Classification
projects.description: Medical image classification using the HAM10000 dataset — 10,015 dermatoscopic images across 7 skin lesion categories. Applied transfer learning, data augmentation, and class imbalance techniques for high-accuracy dermatology AI.

projects.title: GIF to Boot Animation Converter
projects.description: Python-based tool to convert GIF files into Android boot animations. Straightforward interface and commands making device customization accessible for all users. Published on GitHub with community adoption.

certifications.title: Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification
Python for Data Science, AI & Development
